name: Prize-Winning Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and cube the potatoes.
2. Add the cubed potatoes, hard-cooked eggs, crumbled bacon, and sliced scallions to a large bowl.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the remaining ingredients: mayonnaise or salad dressing, sour cream, prepared horseradish, chopped parsley, salt, and pepper.
4. Mix until smooth.
5. Pour the mixture over the potato mix and stir gently until all ingredients are well combined.
6. Cover the bowl and chill in the refrigerator for several hours to allow flavors to meld.
